question: Which scientist proposed the theory whose key mechanism was independently conceived by the naturalist who traveled on HMS Beagle?

context.title: Charles Darwin
context.text: Charles Darwin was an English naturalist who traveled on HMS Beagle. He independently conceived the mechanism of natural selection.

context.title: Natural selection
context.text: Natural selection is the key mechanism of the theory of evolution.

context.title: Theory of evolution
context.text: The theory of evolution by natural selection was independently proposed by Alfred Russel Wallace and Charles Darwin.

reason_hard: Requires linking a voyage clue (HMS Beagle) to Darwin, then abstracting from mechanism to theory, then recovering the co-proposer rather than the more obvious Darwin.
